sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES version

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Each of seven fighters has specialized set of three attack moves and abilities unique to their character

special_mechanics.name: Worshipper Consumption
special_mechanics.description: Characters can devour nearby human tribesmen to regain health; eating opponent's worshippers adds score bonus, eating own worshippers penalizes player

special_mechanics.name: Finishing Moves
special_mechanics.description: Post-victory fatality moves performed after defeating opponent; all characters have three finishing moves with varying effects

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources provide game mechanics overview but no documented movement physics parameters. Game is 2D fighting game with character-specific movesets; physics data would require ROM analysis or gameplay measurement not present in available documentation.
sources_used: tcrf - Primal Rage (SNES) The Cutting Room Floor
